title: Pearto Apples
description: Replaces all apples (including some modded ones) with peartos
body:
Did you ever want your apples to be Pearto? Are you also mentally ill? So am I, but I can help with the first question!

# PEARTO APPLES
![A line of pearto's displayed, matching the Minecraft apple variations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8b76b538c920b14a920bb56e791cfccaf34f185.png)
## Description
A resource pack where all apples are replaced with pearto, including some modded ones!
This was mainly used on 1.20.1, but as far as I know, the current mod versions are still similar enough to function



## Version Support

It was tested on 1.18+ and it worked on all of them. May support previous versions down to 1.13, but those are untested

Note: It will likely say it's outdated, it is not. It works on the newest versions of Minecraft as of 1.21.5 and will likely continue to do so into the far future

## Why?
mental illness
## Future support
Actively working on it with some of the more popular mods
